Package org.eventb.core

Interface ISCContextRoot

All Superinterfaces:
IAccuracyElement, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IAdaptable, IConfigurationElement, IElementManipulation, IEventBRoot, IGeneratedElement, IInternalElement, IParent, IRodinElement, ISCContext, ISnapshotable
All Known Implementing Classes:
SCContextRoot
public interface ISCContextRoot extends ISCContext, IEventBRoot, IAccuracyElement, IConfigurationElement
Common protocol for Event-B statically checked (SC) context files.

An SC context file has a name that is returned by IRodinElement.getElementName().

The elements contained in an event-B SC context are:

  • extends clauses (ISCExtendsContext)
  • internal contexts (ISCInternalContext)
  • carrier sets (ISCCarrierSet)
  • constants (ISCConstant)
  • axioms (ISCAxiom)
  • theorems (ISCTheorem)

The internal contexts are a local copy of the contents of the abstract contexts of this context, i.e., the contexts which are, directly or indirectly, extended by this context. The other child elements of this context are the SC versions of the elements of the unchecked version of this context. They are manipulated by means of ISCContext. In addition, access methods for related file handles are provided.

Since:
1.0
See Also:
  • IRodinElement.getElementName()

  • Field Details

    • ELEMENT_TYPE

      static final IInternalElementType<ISCContextRoot> ELEMENT_TYPE

  • Method Details

    • getSCInternalContext

      ISCInternalContext getSCInternalContext(String elementName)
      Returns a handle to a child internal context with the given element name.

      This is a handle-only method. The child element may or may not be present.

      Parameters:
      elementName - element name of the internal context
      Returns:
      a handle to a child internal context with the given element name

    • getAbstractSCContexts

      ISCInternalContext[] getAbstractSCContexts() throws RodinDBException
      Returns the internal SC contexts that are (transitively) contained in, i.e. extended by, this SC context.
      Returns:
      an array of all internal contexts
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database

    • getSCExtendsClause

      ISCExtendsContext getSCExtendsClause(String elementName)
      Returns a handle to a child SC extends clause with the given element name.

      This is a handle-only method. The child element may or may not be present.

      Parameters:
      elementName - element name of the SC extends clause
      Returns:
      a handle to a child SC extends clause with the given element name

    • getSCExtendsClauses

      ISCExtendsContext[] getSCExtendsClauses() throws RodinDBException
      Returns an array of all SC extends clauses of this SC context.
      Returns:
      an array of SC extends clauses
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database

    • getTypeEnvironment

      ITypeEnvironmentBuilder getTypeEnvironment() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Returns the type environment defined by this context file. The returned type environment is made of all carrier sets and constants defined in this context and its abstractions.

      It can be used subsequently to type-check the axioms and theorems of this context.

      Returns:
      the type environment of this context
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem accessing the database, or while computing the type environment for this root
      Since:
      3.0
